name: Lake Charles RV Resort

previousNames.name: Lake Charles East / Iowa KOA Holiday

name: Lake Charles East / Iowa KOA Holiday - NOW RENAMED
summary_text: A quiet KOA Holiday conveniently located just off Interstate 10 with spacious full-hookup sites, fishing lakes, resort-style amenities, and easy access to Lake Charles and southwest Louisiana.

siteFeatures.level: Large, mostly level pull-through and back-in sites.
otherNotes: Wide roads make navigating larger RVs simple.
Several premium sites overlook the fishing ponds.
A great overnight stop when traveling across the Gulf Coast.

starlink.notes: Minimal tree cover provides a wide, unobstructed view of the sky.

petNotes.walkingAreas: Wide campground roads and open grassy areas make for pleasant dog walks.
petNotes.petRestrictions: Pets must remain leashed outside the dog park.
petNotes.hazards: Expect heat, humidity, mosquitoes, and other biting insects during warmer months.
petNotes.notes: Large grassy areas and the KampK9 make this a comfortable overnight stop with dogs.

hospital.name: Lake Charles Memorial Hospital
hospital.address: 1701 Oak Park Blvd, Lake Charles, LA 70601

emergencyVeterinarian.name: Southwest Louisiana Veterinary Center
emergencyVeterinarian.address: 1615 Country Club Road, Lake Charles, LA 70605

tripTips: Excellent overnight stop when traveling along Interstate 10.
Reserve one of the pond-front sites if available.
Bring fishing gear for the campground lakes.
Pack bug spray during warmer months.
Lake Charles is only a short drive away if you need shopping or supplies.
